An '''electro-jabber''' was a hand-held shock device. It was similar to a [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]], only older and more simplified. They gave the victim a violent and very painful shock.

Electro-jabbers were some of the torture devices used by the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] [[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|IT-0 interrogation droid]] on [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]] while she was held in captivity.<ref name="ROTJ Novel">[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'' (novelization)]]</ref>

During [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] mission to [[Romin]], during a party, the dictator of the planet used an electro-jabber on a [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]] for serving a food item at the wrong time.

{{Weapon-stub}}
